about.title: About
about.subtitle: Economist. Analyst. Writer.
about.bio1: I study the intersection of resource economics, institutional development, and geopolitics in West Africa and the broader Arab world.
about.bio2: My work combines quantitative data analysis with policy research, producing analysis that is both rigorous and accessible to policymakers, journalists, and the public.
about.bio3: I write in English, French, and Arabic — reflecting the linguistic landscape of the regions I cover.
